settings.body: Canada's largest commercial furniture manufacturer — Global's filing cabinets, storage cabinets, and high-density solutions are used in institutional environments across Ontario.

settings.question: Is storage and filing covered under OECM Agreement 2025-470?
settings.answer: Yes. Lateral and vertical filing cabinets, mobile pedestals, storage cabinets, bookcases, lockers, credenzas, and wardrobe units in this collection are all covered under OECM Agreement 2025-470. Ontario school boards, colleges, hospitals, municipalities, and not-for-profits can purchase on an OECM PO without re-tendering. Send to quotes@brantbusinessinteriors.com or call 1-800-835-9565.

settings.question: How do I choose between lateral and vertical filing cabinets?
settings.answer: Lateral cabinets store letter and legal files side-by-side and work well alongside open-plan workstations or as room dividers — the typical pick for contemporary offices and benching environments. Vertical cabinets store letter files front-to-back and have a smaller floor footprint, which suits narrow corridors and private offices. Call 1-800-835-9565 with your file volume and room dimensions and we'll recommend a configuration.

settings.question: Do your storage cabinets include locks?
settings.answer: Cylinder locks are typically included as standard on lateral and vertical filing cabinets, pedestals, and storage cabinets — though specifications vary by model and brand. For specific security or compliance requirements (fire-rated cabinets, controlled-records storage, master-key sets, etc.), call 1-800-835-9565 with the model and the requirement and we'll confirm options directly with the manufacturer.

settings.question: Can storage finishes be matched to our existing desks?
settings.answer: Yes. Most manufacturers we carry — Global Furniture Group, OTG, and Heartwood among them — offer coordinated finishes across their desk, storage, and table lines, so credenzas, pedestals, and bookcases can be specified in the same wood or laminate as the workstation surfaces. If you already own desks from any of these brands and need matching storage, send us a photo or the original PO and we'll quote the matching SKUs.

settings.hero_subtitle: Commercial filing and storage for Ontario institutions — lateral files, lockers, credenzas, and high-density systems. OECM-eligible.
settings.intro_text: From 2-drawer pedestals to floor-to-ceiling high-density systems — Brant Business Interiors carries every storage format required by schools, government offices, and healthcare facilities. OECM Agreement 2025-470 covers the full storage line. Quote in 1 business day.
